hooks.command: FILE_PATH=$(cat /dev/stdin | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE_PATH" ]; then case "$FILE_PATH" in *.ts|*.tsx) REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$REPO_ROOT" ]; then cd "$REPO_ROOT/frontend" && npx prettier --write "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; fi ;; esac; fi
